title: Chain 1/8: Problem at Restaurant
scene: 你的菜等了四十分钟还没上，你向经理投诉。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 经理，我们点的菜四十分钟了还没来。
turns.en: Excuse me, we've been waiting forty minutes for our food.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，厨房人手不够。
turns.en: I'm so sorry. We're short-staffed in the kitchen.

turns.cn: 能理解，但能优先上孩子的餐吗？
turns.en: I understand, but could you prioritize the kids' meals?

turns.cn: 当然，我亲自去催，甜点请你们。
turns.en: Of course. I'll check myself. Dessert is on the house.

turns.cn: 谢谢，希望下次体验更好。
turns.en: Thank you. I hope it's better next time.

turns.cn: 给您一张优惠券，欢迎再来。
turns.en: Here's a coupon. We'd love to have you back.

title: Chain 2/8: Store Refund Dispute
scene: 商店拒绝你的退货，你据理力争。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 这件衣服有瑕疵，我要退款。
turns.en: This shirt has a defect. I want a refund.

turns.cn: 超过三十天不能退。
turns.en: It's past our thirty-day return window.

turns.cn: 但我上周才买，有小票。
turns.en: But I bought it last week. Here's the receipt.

turns.cn: 让我看一下……日期确实在期内。
turns.en: Let me see. You're right, it's within the window.

turns.cn: 可以换一件吗？同款没货就退。
turns.en: Can I exchange it? If you're out, I'll take a refund.

turns.cn: 可以退款，抱歉给您添麻烦。
turns.en: We'll refund you. Sorry for the trouble.

title: Chain 3/8: Leave a Bad Review
scene: 外卖体验差，你在 App 上写差评。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 真要给一星吗？会不会太狠？
turns.en: Really one star? Isn't that harsh?

turns.cn: 凉了还漏送，我写清楚事实。
turns.en: It arrived cold and items were missing. I'll state the facts.

turns.cn: 附上照片更有说服力。
turns.en: Photos make it more convincing.

turns.cn: 拍了，也点了「食物凉了」标签。
turns.en: Done. I tagged cold food too.

turns.cn: 商家可能会联系你。
turns.en: The owner might reach out.

title: Chain 4/8: Owner Calls Back
scene: 你给了差评，商家打电话沟通。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 您好，看到您的评价，想了解一下问题。
turns.en: Hi, I saw your review and wanted to understand what went wrong.

turns.cn: 外卖凉了，薯条软了。
turns.en: The food arrived cold and the fries were soggy.

turns.cn: 那天骑手不够，我们改进了包装。
turns.en: We were short on drivers that day. We've improved our packaging.

turns.cn: 希望如此，我经常点你们家。
turns.en: I hope so. I order from you often.

turns.cn: 下次订单我亲自备注加保温，送您饮料。
turns.en: I'll note extra insulation on your next order and include a free drink.

turns.cn: 好吧，愿意再试一次。
turns.en: Okay. I'm willing to try again.

title: Chain 5/8: Hotel Room Problem
scene: 酒店房间不干净，你要求换房。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 房间浴室有头发，床单也不干净。
turns.en: There's hair in the bathroom and the sheets aren't clean.

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，我给您换一间。
turns.en: I'm terribly sorry. I'll move you to another room.

turns.cn: 要安静一点的，别靠电梯。
turns.en: Something quiet, away from the elevator.

turns.cn: 八楼角落套房空着，我升级给您。
turns.en: A corner suite on eight is open. I'll upgrade you at no charge.

turns.cn: 行李能帮忙搬吗？
turns.en: Can someone help with our luggage?

turns.cn: 马上派行李员上去。
turns.en: I'll send a bellhop right up.

title: Chain 6/8: Flight Delay
scene: 航班延误五小时，你在柜台要求补偿。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 延误五小时，有餐券或酒店吗？
turns.en: Five-hour delay. Any meal vouchers or a hotel?

turns.cn: 天气原因，我们可以发二十块餐券。
turns.en: It's weather-related. We can offer a twenty-dollar meal voucher.

turns.cn: 错过转机，能改签到明早吗？
turns.en: I missed my connection. Can you rebook me for tomorrow morning?

turns.cn: 可以，七点航班，今晚酒店我们安排。
turns.en: Yes. Seven AM flight. We'll arrange a hotel tonight.

turns.cn: 请把延误证明发我邮箱，公司报销用。
turns.en: Please email a delay certificate for my company.

turns.cn: 马上发，抱歉不便。
turns.en: Sending now. Sorry for the inconvenience.

title: Chain 7/8: Credit Card Dispute
scene: 商家多扣费，你打电话给银行争议。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 信用卡客服，请问什么问题？
turns.en: Credit card support. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 商家重复扣款，同一笔收了两次。
turns.en: A merchant charged me twice for the same purchase.

turns.cn: 请报交易日期和金额。
turns.en: Transaction date and amount, please?

turns.cn: 上周三，八十九块九，两次。
turns.en: Last Wednesday, eighty-nine ninety, twice.

turns.cn: 已登记争议，四十五天内调查。
turns.en: Dispute filed. Investigation within forty-five days.

turns.cn: 期间我需要付款吗？
turns.en: Do I need to pay that amount meanwhile?

turns.cn: 争议金额暂时冻结。
turns.en: That amount is on hold during the dispute.

title: Chain 8/8: Complaint Resolved
scene: 一周后，商家和银行都给了满意答复。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 投诉结果怎么样？
turns.en: How did the complaints turn out?

turns.cn: 外卖店送了券，银行退了一笔重复扣款。
turns.en: The restaurant sent coupons. The bank reversed the duplicate charge.

turns.cn: 维权还是有用的。
turns.en: Speaking up actually works.

turns.cn: 对，留好小票和截图很重要。
turns.en: Right. Keeping receipts and screenshots matters.

turns.cn: 下次我遇到问题也跟你学。
turns.en: I'll follow your lead next time.

turns.cn: 客气，该争取就争取。
turns.en: Sure. Stand your ground when it counts.
